Irfan Pathan & Pitch Conundrum for Shubman Gambhir

Former India all-rounder Irfan Pathan has highlighted a contentious episode concerning pitch inspection led by coach Gautam Gambhir, arguing that the incident complicates the preparation landscape for top batsmen like Shubman Gambhir.
